contents.text: The game ends when the chosen gamemode's objective is completed. For classic, this occurs as soon as a king's health bar reaches zero.

For team deathmatch, things work slightly different. Unlike classic, team deathmatch runs on a timer. The game ends when a team reaches the required kill count first. However, if the timer finishes and the teams are tied, the game enters a sudden death situation where the next kill decides the victor.
When a game finishes, all players and spectators are transported back to the lobby, where they can ready up, select characters, and start another match.
